testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: TestCaseId not found in Excel: ATG08

testcase.failure: java.lang.RuntimeException: TestCaseId not found in Excel: ATG08 at stepDefinition.AT_End_To_EndSteps.getExcelValue(AT_End_To_EndSteps.java:96) at stepDefinition.AT_End_To_EndSteps.searchDestinationForGalleryImage(AT_End_To_EndSteps.java:26) at ✽.user searches gallery image destination "Amsterdam"(file:///D:/SPRINT/Booking/src/test/resources/features/AT_End_To_End.feature:6)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Deselected attraction is still displayed in Saved page: Amsterdam expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Deselected attraction is still displayed in Saved page: Amsterdam expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepDefinition.AT_FavSteps.selected_attraction_should_not_be_displayed_in_my_fav_page(AT_FavSteps.java:59) at ✽.selected attraction should not be displayed in my fav page(file:///D:/SPRINT/Booking/src/test/resources/features/AT_Fav.feature:20)

testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: Attraction gallery was not visible after clicking See availability. expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: Attraction gallery was not visible after clicking See availability. expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepDefinition.AT_GallerySteps.attraction_gallery_should_be_visible(AT_GallerySteps.java:36) at ✽.attraction gallery should be visible(file:///D:/SPRINT/Booking/src/test/resources/features/AT_Gallery.feature:7)
